steps.title: Pin down the goal
steps.content: The student wants to "explain the origin of the species' name." The answer must say what Mansourasaurus is named after, not just mention the discovery.

steps.title: Find the relevant note
steps.content: The last two bullets give the source: the team is from Mansoura University, and the species was named to recognize that team. So a complete explanation of the name must link "Mansourasaurus" to Mansoura University.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• 'Mansourasaurus, a new species discovered in Egypt in 2013, lived approximately 80 million years ago.': gives discovery year and age but says nothing about where the name comes from. ✗
  • 'A partial dinosaur skeleton found in Egypt's Dakhla Oasis belonged to a species named Mansourasaurus.': states the name but never explains its origin. ✗
  • 'Mansourasaurus, a species that lived approximately 80 million years ago, was discovered in 2013 by Egyptian paleontologist Hesham Sallam and a team of university students.': identifies the discoverers but never connects the name to them or to Mansoura University. ✗
  • 'The new species was named Mansourasaurus to recognize the team that discovered it, a professor and students from Mansoura University.': explicitly ties the name to Mansoura University — the origin of the name. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
